In principle, while running unattended, the script can keep code and requirements in sync, but in practice it still requires interactive human supervision, so it supports both modes. name: Ralph Wiggum Marketer
description: A Claude Code plugin that provides an autonomous AI copywriter, integrating the Ralph loop with customized knowledge bases for market research agents. name: read-only-postgres
description: Read-only PostgreSQL query skill for Claude Code. Executes SELECT/SHOW/EXPLAIN/WITH queries across configured databases with strict validation, timeouts, and row limits. Supports multiple connections with descriptions for database selection.

name: recall
description: Full-text search your Claude Code sessions. Run `recall` in terminal, type to search, Enter to resume. Alternative to `claude --resume`.

name: Ruflo
description: An orchestration platform for deploying and coordinating multi-agent swarms. If I tried to go into detail it would probably crash my browser. name: supply-chain-risk-auditor

name: TÂCHES Claude Code Resources

name: TDD Guard

name: /tdd-implement

description: Plan, review, and enforce policy around Terraform-based infrastructure changes.

name: Test-Driven Development
description: Enforce red-green-refactor TDD discipline: write failing tests first, implement minimally, then refactor. Prevents writing implementation before tests.
